name: Southwest Ruffle Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise, sour cream, cilantro, milk, lime juice, jalapeno pepper, and salt.
2. Add the cooked pasta, tomatoes, yellow bell pepper, zucchini, and green onions to the bowl.
3. Toss everything together until well coated.
4. Garnish as desired.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving to allow flavors to blend.
